tags.description: Japetić is the highest peak of Plešivica, a reserve of forest vegetation with preserved natural beauty. It is a perfect place for hiking, cycling, mountain climbing and nature lovers in general. At the top there is a beautiful view of the region.
tags.name: Japetić

tags.note:
The point is not the highest peak on the hill, it is not even a peak, but they put it on some maps as a highest peak, which is misleading.

On the HOK map, the peak is marked at the highest point, so I moved it there.

tags.description: Krog Viewpoint is on Stražica cliff (996 m). It offers a view of the western slopes of Učka, Istria and the Josephine Road, named in honour of Emperor Joseph II, who had it built at the end of the 18th century. The road connected Kvarner and Istria.
tags.name: Krog

tags.description: Na incijativu Planinarskog društva Paklenica, prije neimenovani kuk, nazvan je imenima posljednjih stalnih stanovnika Paklenice Jolina i Marije Ramić - Jolin i Marijin kuk.
tags.name: Jolin i Marijin kuk
